# Implementation Plan: Module Setup and Initialization

**Branch**: `001-module-setup` | **Date**: 2026-07-09 | **Spec**: [spec.md](specs/001-module-setup/spec.md)

**Input**: Feature specification from `specs/001-module-setup/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan is generated by the `/speckit-plan` command.

## Summary

Setup the initial module structure for the "Screen Share" Foundry VTT v14 module. This includes initializing a Git repository, providing symbolic link scripts for cross-platform local development installation, generating the `module.json` manifest, and implementing a testing control button under the canvas Regions layer visible only to GMs.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: ES6 JavaScript (compatible with Foundry VTT v14 client environment), Node.js (v18+) for helper scripts.

**Primary Dependencies**: Foundry VTT v14 API.

**Storage**: N/A.

**Testing**: Manual validation in local Foundry VTT v14 module manager and canvas interface.

**Target Platform**: Foundry VTT v14 Host / Client.

**Project Type**: Foundry VTT Module.

**Performance Goals**: Instant module loading, zero runtime UI overhead.

**Constraints**: Symbolic link creation permissions on Windows/macOS/Linux.

**Scale/Scope**: Local development workspace setup, 1 scene control tool registration.

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

- **I. Decoupled Transmission Strategy**: Passed. This feature handles setup only; no streaming code is introduced.
- **II. Explicit WebGL & Network Lifecycle Management**: Passed. No canvas rendering or WebRTC connections are initiated.
- **III. Foundry VTT v14 API Standard Compliance**: Passed. Registration uses standard `getSceneControlButtons` hook and `module.json` syntax.
- **IV. Dual-Role Signaling & Connection Architecture**: Passed. The UI control button is gated to GMs using `game.user.isGM`.
- **V. Masked PixiJS Canvas Rendering**: Passed. No canvas masking or PixiJS manipulation is performed yet.

## Project Structure

```text
C:\Users\Lucas\projects\screen-share/
├── .gitignore               # standard git ignore file
├── .env.example             # example configuration file
├── module.json              # Foundry VTT module manifest
├── screen-share.js          # main module entry script
├── link-module.ps1          # Windows symlink setup script
└── link-module.sh           # macOS/Linux symlink setup script
```

**Structure Decision**: Single project layout matching a standard Foundry VTT module root structure, allowing direct mapping of the workspace root to the VTT modules folder.
